name: LinkedIn Outreach Content Generator with Notion
description: Reads content snippets from a Notion database, researches relevant context via Exa, uses Claude AI to enhance and polish each snippet into engaging LinkedIn posts, and saves the finalized posts back to Google Sheets with a summary to Slack. Adapted from n8n's LinkedIn outreach with Notion and OpenAI workflow.

source.originalName: Automate LinkedIn Outreach with Notion and OpenAI

notionKey.description: Notion connection key for reading content snippets

notionDatabaseId.description: Notion database ID containing content snippets for LinkedIn posts

exaKey.description: Exa connection key for contextual research

sheetsKey.description: Google Sheets connection key for saving finalized posts

spreadsheetId.description: Google Sheets spreadsheet ID for the post schedule

slackKey.description: Slack connection key for posting summary

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID for the summary

steps.name: Query Notion database for content snippets
Extract content snippets from Notion blocks
Build Exa query from snippet themes
Research context via Exa for post enhancement
Build Claude prompt for LinkedIn post generation
Run Claude AI LinkedIn post generation
Save LinkedIn posts to Google Sheets
